description: Existing Express + Prisma app. User asks to add a GET /api/orders endpoint with cursor-based pagination, status filter, and sorting.
user_message: Add a GET /api/orders endpoint in our Express + Prisma app at services/api. It should support cursor-based pagination (limit + cursor), filter by status (pending|paid|shipped|cancelled), and sort by createdAt desc. Make sure error responses follow our existing error contract and include OpenAPI docs.
notes: Endpoint and API contract scope union from the AGENTS.md routing table. Performance triggers because of pagination and index considerations. Security triggers because of input validation.
